findings.summary: No fiducials on F.Cu (569 SMD components) (finest pad dim 0.22mm — BGA/fine-pitch QFN present)
findings.description: F.Cu has 0 fiducial(s) but 569 SMD components. Assembly machines need >= 3 fiducials for accurate placement.
findings.recommendation: Add fiducial markers for pick-and-place alignment (3 per side with SMD).
